ast.target: 文件或文件夹的新相对于保险库的路径。对于文件：包含完整的路径，包括文件名和扩展名，例如 'Archive/NewName.md'。使用不同的文件夹前缀进行移动（例如 'Inbox/A.md' → 'Projects/A.md'），使用不同的文件名进行重命名，或同时更改两者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the file, e.g. 'Notes/MyNote.md'.
ast.target: 文件的相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Notes/MyNote.md'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of edits to apply atomically. Each entry must provide exactly one of `pattern` (literal text mode) or `anchor` (heading-path mode). All entries match the file's pre-edit content; matched ranges across entries must be disjoint.
ast.target: 要原子性应用的编辑列表。每个条目必须恰好提供 `pattern`（字面文本模式）或 `anchor`（标题路径模式）之一。所有条目都匹配文件的编辑前内容；条目之间的匹配范围必须是不相交的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [pattern mode] Text to find. By default literal substring match. Set `use_regex: true` to use JavaScript regex syntax (no // delimiters, e.g. `"foo\\s+bar"`). Must not be empty. Mutually exclusive with `anchor`.
ast.target: [模式模式] 要查找的文本。默认为字面子字符串匹配。设置 `use_regex: true` 以使用 JavaScript 正则表达式语法（无 // 分隔符，例如 `\"foo\\\\s+bar\"`）。不得为空。与 `anchor` 互斥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [anchor mode] Position the edit by heading path. Mutually exclusive with `pattern`. The heading path resolves uniquely against the file's outline; ambiguous or missing paths cause the whole call to fail with a diagnostic listing the available paths.
ast.target: [锚点模式] 通过标题路径定位编辑。与 `pattern` 互斥。标题路径根据文件的大纲唯一解析；模糊或缺失的路径会导致整个调用失败，并列出可用的路径作为诊断信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Heading titles, outermost → innermost, that the target heading's ancestor chain must END WITH. A short tail (even a single leaf title) is accepted IF it is unique in the file; otherwise the call fails as ambiguous and you must prepend more ancestors. Intermediate ancestors must NOT be skipped.
ast.target: 标题标题，从最外层到最内层，目标标题的祖先链必须以此结尾。如果它是文件中唯一的，则接受短尾（即使是单个叶子标题）；否则调用将因模糊而失败，您必须添加更多祖先。不得跳过中间祖先。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text to substitute in. For pattern mode, '' deletes the match. For anchor mode insert/append/prepend variants, '' is allowed but unusual.
ast.target: 要替换的文本。对于模式模式，'' 删除匹配项。对于锚点模式的插入/追加/前置变体，'' 是允许的但不常见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [pattern mode only] If true, replace every occurrence of `pattern`. Defaults to false. Not allowed in anchor mode (an anchor resolves to a unique location).
ast.target: [仅模式模式] 如果为 true，则替换 `pattern` 的每个出现项。默认为 false。在锚点模式中不允许（锚点解析到唯一位置）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [pattern mode only] Optional assertion: number of occurrences of `pattern` you expect in the pre-edit file. If actual count differs, the whole call fails before any write. Not allowed in anchor mode.
ast.target: [仅模式模式] 可选断言：您期望在编辑前文件中 `pattern` 出现的次数。如果实际计数不同，整个调用将在任何写入之前失败。在锚点模式中不允许。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, bypass the tag-shape safety guard for this entry only (pattern mode). Defaults to false. In anchor mode the guard does not apply; force is accepted for symmetry but has no effect.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则仅对此条目绕过标签形状安全防护（模式模式）。默认为 false。在锚点模式中，防护不适用；为保持对称性接受 force 参数，但没有效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, validate and preview the result without modifying the file. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则验证并预览结果而不修改文件。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional Unix ms; the file's expected current `mtime`. If actual on-disk `mtime` differs, the call fails (concurrent-edit guard). Chain from a prior read tool's `mtime` or another write tool's `new_mtime`.
ast.target: 可选的 Unix 毫秒时间戳；文件预期的当前 `mtime`。如果磁盘上的实际 `mtime` 不同，调用将失败（并发编辑保护）。从先前读取工具的 `mtime` 或另一个写入工具的 `new_mtime` 链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of edits to apply atomically. Each edit's line numbers refer to the file BEFORE any edit is applied. Ranged edits (replace/delete) must not overlap. Insert edits (op: insert_before) are zero-width and never conflict.
ast.target: 要原子性应用的编辑列表。每个编辑的行号指的是应用任何编辑之前的文件。范围编辑（替换/删除）不得重叠。插入编辑（操作：insert_before）是零宽度的，永远不会冲突。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1-based INCLUSIVE physical end of the range. Required for replace/delete, UNUSED for insert_before. The range is [start_line, end_line] — both bounds inclusive. Must be >= start_line (for replace/delete). Field name is `end_line` (with underscore). LLM aliases `end` also accepted.
ast.target: 基于 1 的包含性物理范围结束行。对于替换/删除是必需的，对于 insert_before 未使用。范围是 [start_line, end_line] — 两个边界都包含。必须 >= start_line（对于替换/删除）。字段名是 `end_line`（带下划线）。LLM 别名 `end` 也被接受。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For replace: the new content. May be more or fewer lines than the original range. For delete: pass "" (empty string). For insert_before: the content to insert before `start_line`. Pass "" to insert a single blank line. Include \n between lines for multi-line content.
ast.target: 对于替换：新内容。行数可以比原始范围多或少。对于删除：传递 \"\"（空字符串）。对于 insert_before：要在 `start_line` 之前插入的内容。传递 \"\" 以插入一个空行。对于多行内容，在行之间包含 \\n。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative paths of the markdown files to edit (1 or more). All paths must point to existing markdown files.
ast.target: 要编辑的 Markdown 文件的 Vault 相对路径（1 个或多个）。所有路径必须指向现有的 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 'set' = assign each key in `properties` to the given value. 'unset' = remove each key listed in `keys` from frontmatter.
ast.target: 'set' = 将 `properties` 中的每个键设置为给定值。'unset' = 从 frontmatter 中移除 `keys` 中列出的每个键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [op=set only] Object mapping frontmatter key → new value. Values may be string, number, boolean, array, object, or null. Keys `tags` / `tag` are refused — use add_files_tags / remove_files_tags / set_files_tags / rename_tag.
ast.target: [仅 op=set] 将 frontmatter 键映射到新值的对象。值可以是字符串、数字、布尔值、数组、对象或 null。键 `tags` / `tag` 被拒绝 — 请使用 add_files_tags / remove_files_tags / set_files_tags / rename_tag。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [op=unset only] Frontmatter keys to remove. Keys `tags` / `tag` are refused — use add_files_tags / remove_files_tags / set_files_tags.
ast.target: [仅 op=unset] 要移除的 frontmatter 键。键 `tags` / `tag` 被拒绝 — 请使用 add_files_tags / remove_files_tags / set_files_tags。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, return the per-file impact report without modifying any files. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则返回每个文件的影响报告而不修改任何文件。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The FULL new content of the file. This replaces the existing content verbatim (no implicit newline added / stripped).
ast.target: 文件的完整新内容。这将逐字替换现有内容（不添加/去除隐式换行符）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, validate and return the size / excerpt envelope WITHOUT modifying the file. Does NOT return the full new content — the caller already has it.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则验证并返回大小/摘录信封而不修改文件。不返回完整的新内容 — 调用者已经拥有它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the template file, e.g. 'Templates/Daily Note.md'. The file must exist.
ast.target: 模板文件的 Vault 相对路径，例如 'Templates/Daily Note.md'。该文件必须存在。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path for the output file, e.g. 'Journal/2025-05-25.md'. Must NOT already exist. File extension is required and will not be inferred — use '.md' for markdown notes.
ast.target: 输出文件的 Vault 相对路径，例如 'Journal/2025-05-25.md'。必须不存在。文件扩展名是必需的，不会被推断 — 对于 Markdown 笔记请使用 '.md'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional map of custom variable name → value pairs. When a `{{key}}` appears in the template, it is replaced with the corresponding value. Omit this parameter if no custom variables are needed. Example: {"project_name": "My Project", "client": "Acme"}
ast.target: 可选的自定义变量名 → 值对映射。当模板中出现 `{{key}}` 时，它将被替换为相应的值。如果不需要自定义变量，请省略此参数。示例：{\"project_name\": \"My Project\", \"client\": \"Acme\"}

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional ISO-8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD) used as the reference date for {{date}}, {{yesterday}}, {{tomorrow}}, and date-formatted variables. Defaults to today's date. Use this to create a note for a specific date, e.g. "2025-05-25".
ast.target: 可选的 ISO-8601 日期字符串（YYYY-MM-DD），用作 {{date}}、{{yesterday}}、{{tomorrow}} 和日期格式化变量的参考日期。默认为今天的日期。使用此选项为特定日期创建笔记，例如 \"2025-05-25\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How many top file extensions to list by count in the response. Defaults to 10.
ast.target: 在响应中按计数列出多少个顶级文件扩展名。默认为 10。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List files sorted by `mtime` (default; most recent first), `ctime`, or `size`. Optionally filter by minimum mtime, file extension, or folder prefix. Use for 'what did I edit recently?', 'what are my largest notes?', 'what are the oldest notes?' and similar recency / size queries.
ast.target: 按 `mtime`（默认；最近优先）、`ctime` 或 `size` 排序文件。可选地按最小 mtime、文件扩展名或文件夹前缀过滤。用于“我最近编辑了什么？”、“我最大的笔记是什么？”、“最旧的笔记是什么？”以及类似的近期/大小查询。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of files to return. Defaults to 20.
ast.target: 要返回的最大文件数。默认为 20。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Field to sort by. 'mtime' = modification time (default), 'ctime' = creation time, 'size' = file size in bytes.
ast.target: 排序字段。'mtime' = 修改时间（默认），'ctime' = 创建时间，'size' = 文件大小（字节）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort direction. 'desc' = descending (default, e.g. newest/largest first), 'asc' = ascending (e.g. oldest/smallest first).
ast.target: 排序方向。'desc' = 降序（默认，例如最新/最大优先），'asc' = 升序（例如最旧/最小优先）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unix timestamp in milliseconds; only return files modified at or after this time. Omit to include all files.
ast.target: Unix 时间戳（毫秒）；仅返回在此时间或之后修改的文件。省略以包含所有文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional file extension filter (e.g. 'md', 'pdf'). Omit to include every extension.
ast.target: 可选的文件扩展名过滤器（例如 'md'、'pdf'）。省略以包含所有扩展名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative folder prefix filter (e.g. 'Projects/'). Only files whose path starts with this prefix are returned. Omit to search the entire vault.
ast.target: 可选的 Vault 相对文件夹前缀过滤器（例如 'Projects/'）。仅返回路径以此前缀开头的文件。省略以搜索整个 Vault。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the folder to list. Use '' or '/' for the vault root.
ast.target: 要列出的文件夹的 Vault 相对路径。使用 '' 或 '/' 表示 Vault 根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How many levels of descendants to include. 0 (default) = only direct children of `path`. 1 = direct children and their children. -1 = fully recursive, no depth limit. Use 2 as a good default when exploring an unfamiliar vault.
ast.target: 要包含的后代层级数。0（默认）= 仅 `path` 的直接子项。1 = 直接子项及其子项。-1 = 完全递归，无深度限制。在探索不熟悉的 Vault 时，使用 2 作为良好的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter entries by type. "all" (default) returns both files and folders. "folder" returns only folder entries. "file" returns only file entries.
ast.target: 按类型过滤条目。\"all\"（默认）返回文件和文件夹。\"folder\" 仅返回文件夹条目。\"file\" 仅返回文件条目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of matching entries to skip before starting to collect results. Use together with `limit` for paginated browsing. Defaults to 0. When `has_more` is true, increase `skip` by the previous `count` to fetch the next page.
ast.target: 在开始收集结果之前要跳过的匹配条目数。与 `limit` 一起使用以进行分页浏览。默认为 0。当 `has_more` 为 true 时，将 `skip` 增加上一个 `count` 以获取下一页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of entries to return. Defaults to 1000. If there are more entries beyond `skip + limit`, the response will include `has_more: true`. Use `skip` to paginate through large folders.
ast.target: 要返回的最大条目数。默认为 1000。如果 `skip + limit` 之外还有更多条目，响应将包含 `has_more: true`。使用 `skip` 来分页浏览大型文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path of the target file whose backlinks should be returned.
ast.target: 应返回其反向链接的目标文件的 Vault 相对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of backlink source files to return. Defaults to 50.
ast.target: 要返回的最大反向链接源文件数。默认为 50。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which kind of files to scan. 'all' (default) scans every file. 'note' scans only markdown/canvas notes (.md, .canvas). 'attachment' scans only non-note files (images, PDFs, audio, etc.).
ast.target: 要扫描的文件类型。'all'（默认）扫描每个文件。'note' 仅扫描 Markdown/Canvas 笔记（.md、.canvas）。'attachment' 仅扫描非笔记文件（图像、PDF、音频等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative folder prefix filter (e.g. 'Attachments/'). Only files whose path starts with this prefix are considered. Omit to scan the entire vault.
ast.target: 可选的 Vault 相对文件夹前缀过滤器（例如 'Attachments/'）。仅考虑路径以此前缀开头的文件。省略以扫描整个 Vault。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional exact extension filter (e.g. 'png', 'pdf'). Leading dot is tolerated. Omit to include every extension.
ast.target: 可选的精确扩展名过滤器（例如 'png'、'pdf'）。允许前导点。省略以包含所有扩展名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort key for the result page. 'path' (default) gives stable, pageable ordering. 'size' and 'mtime' are useful when the user wants to prioritise large or stale files.
ast.target: 结果页的排序键。'path'（默认）提供稳定、可分页的排序。'size' 和 'mtime' 在用户希望优先处理大文件或陈旧文件时很有用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort direction. Defaults to 'asc' for 'path', 'desc' for 'size' and 'mtime' when omitted.
ast.target: 排序方向。当省略时，'path' 默认为 'asc'，'size' 和 'mtime' 默认为 'desc'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of matching orphan files to skip before starting to collect results. Use together with `limit` for paginated browsing. Defaults to 0. When `has_more` is true, increase `skip` by the previous `count` to fetch the next page.
ast.target: 在开始收集结果之前要跳过的匹配孤立文件数。与 `limit` 一起使用以进行分页浏览。默认为 0。当 `has_more` 为 true 时，将 `skip` 增加上一个 `count` 以获取下一页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of orphan files to return in this page. Defaults to 100. Hard maximum 500.
ast.target: 在此页中要返回的最大孤立文件数。默认为 100。硬上限 500。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path of the source file whose outgoing links should be returned.
ast.target: 应返回其出站链接的源文件的 Vault 相对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, also include unresolved (broken) wikilinks under `unresolved`. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，还在 `unresolved` 下包含未解析（断开）的 Wiki 链接。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: View shape. 'source' = one entry per source file with its broken links underneath. 'link' = one entry per missing target with the sources pointing at it underneath. Defaults to 'source'.
ast.target: 视图形状。'source' = 每个源文件一个条目，其断开链接在下方。'link' = 每个缺失目标一个条目，指向它的源在下方。默认为 'source'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative folder prefix filter on the SOURCE file path (e.g. 'Projects/'). Only broken links from files under this prefix are returned. Omit to scan the entire vault.
ast.target: 可选的 Vault 相对文件夹前缀过滤器，应用于 SOURCE 文件路径（例如 'Projects/'）。仅返回来自此前缀下文件的断开链接。省略以扫描整个 Vault。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional case-insensitive substring filter on the unresolved link text. Use to narrow to a specific missing target name. Omit to include all.
ast.target: 可选的不区分大小写的子字符串过滤器，应用于未解析的链接文本。用于缩小到特定的缺失目标名称。省略以包含所有。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of grouped entries to skip before collecting results. Defaults to 0. Use together with `limit` for pagination.
ast.target: 在收集结果之前要跳过的分组条目数。默认为 0。与 `limit` 一起使用以进行分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of ranked notes to skip for pagination. Defaults to 0.
ast.target: 为分页要跳过的排名笔记数。默认为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative folder prefix; only source notes under this path are ranked (e.g. 'Daily/').
ast.target: 可选的 Vault 相对文件夹前缀；仅排名此路径下的源笔记（例如 'Daily/'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only return notes whose embedded attachment total is at least this many bytes. Omit to include any note with at least one counted attachment.
ast.target: 仅返回嵌入附件总大小至少为此字节数的笔记。省略以包含任何至少有一个已计数附件的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, include `top_attachments` per note (largest contributing targets). Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，为每个笔记包含 `top_attachments`（最大的贡献目标）。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all tags in the vault with per-tag note counts. Tags are returned as `#tag`. Optionally filter by a prefix to narrow to a tag namespace (e.g. `project/`). Use to discover tag vocabulary before searching for notes.
ast.target: 列出 Vault 中的所有标签及其每个标签的笔记计数。标签以 `#tag` 形式返回。可选地按前缀过滤以缩小到标签命名空间（例如 `project/`）。用于在搜索笔记之前发现标签词汇。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional tag prefix filter. Can be provided with or without the leading '#'. Example: 'project/' returns all sub-tags of #project. Omit to list all tags.
ast.target: 可选的标签前缀过滤器。可以带或不带前导 '#' 提供。示例：'project/' 返回 #project 的所有子标签。省略以列出所有标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of tags to return, sorted by descending note count. Defaults to 100.
ast.target: 返回的最大标签数量，按笔记数量降序排序。默认为100。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of tags to skip. Defaults to 0. Set to previous skip + number of returned tags to fetch the next page when has_more is true.
ast.target: 要跳过的标签数量。默认为0。当has_more为true时，设置为之前的跳过数加上返回的标签数，以获取下一页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of tags to search for (1–10 tags), with or without the leading '#'. Example: ['project', '#review'].
ast.target: 要搜索的标签数组（1-10个标签），可以带或不带前导'#'。示例：['project', '#review']。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to combine the tag list. 'any' (default) = OR — a file matches if it carries ANY one of the tags. 'all' = AND — a file must carry EVERY tag. With a single tag in the list, both modes are equivalent.
ast.target: 如何组合标签列表。'any'（默认）= 或——如果文件带有列表中的任何一个标签，则匹配。'all' = 与——文件必须带有列表中的所有标签。当列表中只有一个标签时，两种模式等效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, also match nested sub-tags (e.g. tag='project' matches #project/alpha). Defaults to false (exact match only).
ast.target: 如果为true，也会匹配嵌套的子标签（例如，标签='project'会匹配#project/alpha）。默认为false（仅精确匹配）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of matching files to return. Defaults to 200.
ast.target: 返回的最大匹配文件数。默认为200。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of matching results to skip. Defaults to 0. Set to previous skip + count to fetch the next page when has_more is true.
ast.target: 要跳过的匹配结果数量。默认为0。当has_more为true时，设置为之前的跳过数加上返回数量，以获取下一页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The existing tag to rename or remove, with or without the leading '#'. Example: 'project' or '#project'.
ast.target: 要重命名或移除的现有标签，可以带或不带前导'#'。示例：'project'或'#project'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The new tag name, with or without the leading '#'. Omit or pass an empty string to remove the tag vault-wide instead of renaming it. When renaming, must be a valid tag identifier (no whitespace, quotes, or YAML special characters). Example: 'work/project' or '#work/project'.
ast.target: 新的标签名称，可以带或不带前导'#'。省略或传递空字符串将移除整个保险库中的标签，而不是重命名。重命名时，必须是有效的标签标识符（无空格、引号或YAML特殊字符）。示例：'work/project'或'#work/project'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, also affect every nested sub-tag, preserving the sub-path for renames (e.g. old_tag='project', new_tag='work' will rewrite '#project/alpha' to '#work/alpha') or removing descendants when deleting. Defaults to false (affect the exact tag only).
ast.target: 如果为true，也会影响所有嵌套的子标签，在重命名时保留子路径（例如，old_tag='project'，new_tag='work'会将'#project/alpha'重写为'#work/alpha'），或在删除时移除后代标签。默认为false（仅影响精确匹配的标签）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, return the per-file impact report without modifying any files. Defaults to false. Strongly recommended to run once with dry_run=true first.
ast.target: 如果为true，返回每个文件的影响报告而不修改任何文件。默认为false。强烈建议先使用dry_run=true运行一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative paths of the markdown files to add tags to (1 or more). All paths must point to existing markdown files.
ast.target: 要添加标签的Markdown文件的保险库相对路径（1个或多个）。所有路径必须指向现有的Markdown文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tag names to add, with or without the leading '#'. Must be non-empty. Example: ['todo', '#project/alpha'].
ast.target: 要添加的标签名称，可以带或不带前导'#'。必须非空。示例：['todo', '#project/alpha']。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Where to add the tags. `frontmatter` (default) = add to YAML frontmatter tags. `inline` = append `#tag` occurrences on a new line at the end of the file. Defaults to `frontmatter`.
ast.target: 添加标签的位置。`frontmatter`（默认）= 添加到YAML frontmatter标签。`inline` = 在文件末尾的新行追加`#tag`出现。默认为`frontmatter`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative paths of the markdown files to remove tags from (1 or more). All paths must point to existing markdown files.
ast.target: 要移除标签的Markdown文件的保险库相对路径（1个或多个）。所有路径必须指向现有的Markdown文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tag names to remove, with or without the leading '#'. Must be non-empty. Example: ['todo', '#project/alpha'].
ast.target: 要移除的标签名称，可以带或不带前导'#'。必须非空。示例：['todo', '#project/alpha']。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Where to remove the tags from. `both` (default) = remove from YAML frontmatter AND inline `#tag` occurrences. `frontmatter` = only remove from YAML frontmatter tags. `inline` = only remove inline `#tag` occurrences in the body. Defaults to `both`.
ast.target: 从哪里移除标签。`both`（默认）= 从YAML frontmatter和内联`#tag`出现中移除。`frontmatter` = 仅从YAML frontmatter标签中移除。`inline` = 仅移除正文中的内联`#tag`出现。默认为`both`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, also remove every nested sub-tag (e.g. removing 'project' will also remove '#project/alpha', '#project/beta', etc.). Defaults to false (exact match only).
ast.target: 如果为true，也会移除所有嵌套的子标签（例如，移除'project'也会移除'#project/alpha'、'#project/beta'等）。默认为false（仅精确匹配）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative paths of the markdown files to set tags on (1 or more). All paths must point to existing markdown files.
ast.target: 要设置标签的Markdown文件的保险库相对路径（1个或多个）。所有路径必须指向现有的Markdown文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The exact list of tag names to set, with or without the leading '#'. May be empty to clear all frontmatter tags. Example: ['todo', '#project/alpha', 'reviewed'].
ast.target: 要设置的标签名称的精确列表，可以带或不带前导'#'。可以为空以清除所有frontmatter标签。示例：['todo', '#project/alpha', 'reviewed']。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to a .canvas file, e.g. 'Boards/Overview.canvas'.
ast.target: .canvas文件的保险库相对路径，例如'Boards/Overview.canvas'。

ast.name: description

ast.name: description

ast.target: 创建一个新的 Obsidian Bases 文件（`.base`，YAML）。内容在写入前会经过验证（YAML 解析 + 视图结构）。如果路径已存在则拒绝。对于 Bases 文件，请优先使用此方法而非 `create_file`。不执行筛选表达式——仅进行静态验证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path ending in `.base`, e.g. 'Bases/Orphans.base'. Must NOT already exist.
ast.target: 以 `.base` 结尾的相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Bases/Orphans.base'。必须尚不存在。

ast.source: Replace the ENTIRE body of an existing `.base` file with new YAML content. Validated before writing. Does NOT create new files — use `create_base`.
ast.target: 用新的 YAML 内容替换现有 `.base` 文件的整个主体。写入前会进行验证。不创建新文件——请使用 `create_base`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to an existing .base file.
ast.target: 指向现有 .base 文件的相对于保险库的路径。

ast.source: New filters value — a string expression or nested and/or/not object. Pass null to remove filters (global or view-level).

ast.name: description

ast.target: 使用 DuckDuckGo 搜索网络并返回结果列表（标题、URL、摘要）。当用户要求搜索、查找、查找信息、检查或查询互联网/网络上的内容时使用此功能。在调用 web_fetch_url 获取实际内容之前，请先调用此功能。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 在网络上搜索图像并返回与查询匹配的图像 URL 列表。当用户想要在线查找、寻找或搜索图像/图片时使用此功能。注意：仅返回 URL；请使用 download_image_urls 将图像保存到保险库。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 图像的搜索查询。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An array of image URLs to save.
ast.target: 要保存的图像 URL 数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of images to save. Must not exceed 20.
ast.target: 要保存的图像数量。不得超过 20。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full URL of the page to fetch.
ast.target: 要获取的页面的完整 URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fetch and parse an RSS or Atom feed from a given URL. Returns the feed metadata and a list of items (title, link, description, date, author). Use this when the user wants to read, subscribe to, or check updates from a blog, news site, podcast, or any RSS/Atom feed source.
ast.target: 从给定 URL 获取并解析 RSS 或 Atom 订阅源。返回订阅源元数据和项目列表（标题、链接、描述、日期、作者）。当用户想要阅读、订阅或检查博客、新闻网站、播客或任何 RSS/Atom 订阅源的更新时使用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The RSS/Atom feed URL to fetch.
ast.target: 要获取的 RSS/Atom 订阅源 URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of feed items to return (default 20, max 50).
ast.target: 返回的最大订阅源项目数（默认 20，最大 50）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the current date and time information. Returns ISO datetime, Unix timestamp, formatted local time, weekday, and Chinese lunar calendar date. Use this when the user asks about 'now', 'today', 'current time', 'what time is it', 'what day is it', or needs temporal context for their query.
ast.target: 获取当前日期和时间信息。返回 ISO 日期时间、Unix 时间戳、格式化的本地时间、星期几和中国农历日期。当用户询问“现在”、“今天”、“当前时间”、“几点了”、“星期几”或需要查询的时间上下文时使用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional timezone string (e.g., 'Asia/Shanghai', 'UTC'). Defaults to the system's local timezone.
ast.target: 可选的时区字符串（例如 'Asia/Shanghai'、'UTC'）。默认为系统的本地时区。

ast.source: JavaScript code to execute. Runs as the body of an async function in strict mode with `app`, `console`, and `signal` as parameters. Use `return` to produce output. Avoid infinite loops or long-running operations.
ast.target: 要执行的 JavaScript 代码。作为严格模式下的异步函数体运行，参数为 `app`、`console` 和 `signal`。使用 `return` 生成输出。避免无限循环或长时间运行的操作。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 记忆条目的简短描述性标题（≤ 60 个字符），使用用户的语言。用作记忆笔记中的 `## 标题` 和去重重键——重复使用标题将替换现有条目。不要自己添加 ` [!]` 标记；请设置 `critical` 字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Memory content. One or two sentences (or a short bullet list) expressing the durable fact as a directive the assistant can read literally — not as a description of the conversation. Same language as the user.
ast.target: 记忆内容。一两句话（或简短的项目符号列表），以助手可以逐字阅读的指令形式表达持久事实——而不是对话的描述。与用户使用相同的语言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether this entry is injected into the system prompt on EVERY turn (true) or only when it appears relevant to the user's current query (false). Default false; reserve true for entries that must influence every reply.
ast.target: 此条目是否在每一轮对话中都注入系统提示（true），还是仅在与用户当前查询相关时注入（false）。默认为 false；保留 true 用于必须影响每条回复的条目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete a memory entry by its heading. Use this ONLY when the user explicitly rescinds, replaces, or corrects a previously stored memory in the current turn. Never delete based on inference, silence, or apparent contradiction. Deleting a non-existent entry is a safe no-op.
ast.target: 通过标题删除记忆条目。仅当用户在当前轮次中明确撤回、替换或更正先前存储的记忆时才使用此功能。切勿基于推断、沉默或明显矛盾进行删除。删除不存在的条目是安全的空操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical heading of the memory to delete, exactly as it was stored (without the ` [!]` critical marker — the store strips it on read). Matching is case-insensitive.
ast.target: 要删除的记忆的逻辑标题，与存储时完全一致（不带 ` [!]` 关键标记——存储时读取会剥离它）。匹配不区分大小写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The exact skill name as advertised in 'Available Skills'. Matching is case-insensitive.
ast.target: 在“可用技能”中公布的确切技能名称。匹配不区分大小写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate an image based on a text description using AI. The generated image will be saved to the vault and a markdown image link will be returned. Use this when the user asks to create, draw, generate, design, make, or produce an image, illustration, picture, or artwork.
ast.target: 使用 AI 根据文本描述生成图像。生成的图像将保存到保险库，并返回一个 Markdown 图像链接。当用户要求创建、绘制、生成、设计、制作或生产图像、插图、图片或艺术品时使用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A detailed text description of the image to generate. Be as specific as possible about the subject, style, composition, colors, and mood.
ast.target: 要生成的图像的详细文本描述。尽可能具体地描述主题、风格、构图、颜色和情绪。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect ratio of the generated image. Common: '1:1' (square), '16:9' / '21:9' (landscape), '9:16' (portrait), '4:3' / '3:4', '3:2' / '2:3', '5:4' / '4:5'. Omit to let the model pick a default.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The resolution bucket for the generated image. '1K' (default, ~1024px on the long side), '2K' (~2048px), '4K' (~4096px). Use a larger value only when the user asks for high resolution; larger sizes are slower and more expensive.
ast.target: 生成图像的分辨率桶。'1K'（默认，长边约 1024 像素）、'2K'（约 2048 像素）、'4K'（约 4096 像素）。仅当用户要求高分辨率时才使用较大的值；较大的尺寸更慢且更昂贵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect ratio of the generated image. Common: '1:1' (square), '16:9' / '21:9' (landscape), '9:16' (portrait), '4:3' / '3:4', '3:2' / '2:3'. The actual pixel resolution is chosen automatically based on the configured model. Omit to let the model pick a default.
ast.target: 生成图像的宽高比。常见：'1:1'（正方形）、'16:9' / '21:9'（横向）、'9:16'（纵向）、'4:3' / '3:4'、'3:2' / '2:3'。实际像素分辨率根据配置的模型自动选择。省略则让模型选择默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A text description of what to avoid in the generated image. Describe elements, styles, or qualities that should NOT appear in the image. Leave empty or omit if not needed.
ast.target: 描述生成图像中应避免的内容的文本描述。描述不应出现在图像中的元素、风格或品质。如果不需要，请留空或省略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The quality of the generated image. Supported values: 'standard', 'hd'. Only available for DALL-E 3.
ast.target: 生成图像的质量。支持的值：'standard'、'hd'。仅适用于 DALL-E 3。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The style of the generated image. Supported values: 'vivid' (hyper-real), 'natural' (more natural). Only available for DALL-E 3.
ast.target: 生成图像的风格。支持的值：'vivid'（超写实）、'natural'（更自然）。仅适用于 DALL-E 3。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect ratio of the generated image. Common: '1:1' (square), '16:9' / '21:9' (landscape), '9:16' (portrait), '4:3' / '3:4', '3:2' / '2:3'. The actual pixel resolution is chosen automatically. Omit to let the model pick a default (1024x1024).

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of turns to retrieve. Each turn contains one user message and its corresponding assistant response. Recommended: 1-3 turns. If 0 or negative, defaults to 1 turn.
ast.target: 要检索的轮数。每轮包含一条用户消息及其对应的助手回复。建议：1-3轮。如果为0或负数，则默认为1轮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The artifact key to recall. Comes from `envelope.artifacts[i].key`, an `__artifact_ref` placeholder in a stale tool_result, or an explicit hint in `envelope.omitted`. Must be a non-empty string.
ast.target: 要召回的构件键。来自 `envelope.artifacts[i].key`、过时 tool_result 中的 `__artifact_ref` 占位符，或 `envelope.omitted` 中的显式提示。必须是非空字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 'write' replaces the whole list (use for the initial plan); 'update' patches one item by id (typical use: mark in_progress / completed); 'list' returns the current snapshot without mutating; 'clear' removes every item.
ast.target: 'write' 替换整个列表（用于初始计划）；'update' 按 id 修补单个项目（典型用途：标记为进行中/已完成）；'list' 返回当前快照而不进行修改；'clear' 移除所有项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used only with action='write'. The full new list. Each entry needs `id` (short stable string you choose), `brief` (one-line user-facing summary, ≤ 80 chars), and `content` (longer machine-facing task spec, ≤ 700 chars). `status` defaults to 'pending' when omitted.
ast.target: 仅与 action='write' 一起使用。完整的新列表。每个条目需要 `id`（您选择的简短稳定字符串）、`brief`（单行用户可见摘要，≤ 80 字符）和 `content`（较长的机器可读任务规范，≤ 700 字符）。省略时 `status` 默认为 'pending'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Short stable identifier you pick (e.g. "step-1", "refactor"). Must be unique within the list.
ast.target: 您选择的简短稳定标识符（例如 \"step-1\"、\"refactor\"）。在列表中必须唯一。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Short user-facing summary (≤ 80 chars). Rendered verbatim in the TODO panel — keep it to a single line in the user's language. Required.
ast.target: 简短的用户可见摘要（≤ 80 字符）。在 TODO 面板中逐字渲染——请保持为用户语言的单行。必填。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your per-item scratchpad (≤ 700 chars). Write the concrete plan for this step: files involved, operations, dependencies, success criteria. You will re-read this when you return to the item after intervening tool calls or context compression. Required.
ast.target: 您的每项暂存区（≤ 700 字符）。为此步骤编写具体计划：涉及的文件、操作、依赖项、成功标准。当您在后续工具调用或上下文压缩后返回该项目时，将重新阅读此内容。必填。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Initial status. Defaults to "pending" when omitted.
ast.target: 初始状态。省略时默认为 \"pending\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Required for action='update'. The id of the item to patch.
ast.target: action='update' 时必填。要修补的项目的 id。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used with action='update'. New status for the item.
ast.target: 与 action='update' 一起使用。项目的新状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used with action='update'. New user-facing `brief` for the item (≤ 80 chars). Provide when the user-visible summary needs revision; omit to keep the existing one.
ast.target: 与 action='update' 一起使用。项目的新用户可见 `brief`（≤ 80 字符）。当用户可见的摘要需要修订时提供；省略则保留现有内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used with action='update'. New machine-facing `content` for the item (≤ 700 chars). Use this when the plan for this step has been refined (e.g. you learnt new files are involved, the success criterion shifted). Omit to keep the existing `content`.
ast.target: 与 action='update' 一起使用。项目的新机器可读 `content`（≤ 700 字符）。当此步骤的计划已细化时使用（例如，您了解到涉及新文件，成功标准发生变化）。省略则保留现有 `content`。
